metadata.description: Specialized workflows for AI coding agents — structured expertise for tasks that benefit from a repeatable, opinionated process.

plugins.name: train
plugins.description: Multi-faceted training coach with five modes (quiz, flashcard, teach-back, scenario, practice) plus adaptive difficulty, browser UI, and cross-session progression tracking

plugins.name: git-squash
plugins.description: Squashes a git branch into fewer, more meaningful commits with well-structured messages

plugins.name: skill-forge
plugins.description: Creates publishable agent skills with proper plugin structure, READMEs, and eval-backed quality

plugins.name: scaffold
plugins.description: Scaffolds a full-stack JS/TS project — picks technologies for each layer, runs the CLI, and wires up all the boilerplate

plugins.name: user-journey
plugins.description: Generate Playwright E2E test specs for user journeys — login flows, checkout funnels, onboarding wizards, or any multi-step browser interaction

plugins.name: ml-architect
plugins.description: Structured interactive workflow for designing and producing runnable ML pipelines — problem definition, data strategy, model selection, training, evaluation, and deployment with cascading invalidation

plugins.name: agent-forge
plugins.description: Create specialized TypeScript agents by composing AI SDK, Chat SDK, MCP tools, and sandboxes — interactive wizard that scaffolds standalone agent projects with the right interface, tools, and model configuration
